name: Charlton Heston
abstract: Charlton Heston (born John Charles Carter; October 4, 1923 – April 5, 2008) was an American actor and political activist. He gained stardom for his leading man roles in numerous Hollywood films including biblical epics, historical drama films, science-fiction films, and action films.

about_quotes.speaker: JJ Johnson
about_quotes.evidence: The interviewee discusses Jerry Goldsmith's score for Planet of the Apes, which the interviewer identifies as being with Charlton Heston. The interviewee does not mention meeting or interacting with Heston directly.
about_quotes.doc_title: JJ Johnson — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History

about_quotes.speaker: Yusef Lateef
about_quotes.evidence: He played Moses. >> [INTERVIEWER] Uh...Charlton Heston, I think... [INTERVIEWEE] No.
about_quotes.doc_title: Yusef Lateef — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
